luma.screen.create_project.title: Create Project

luma.dashboard.empty: Lumi could not find a workspace for this world yet.
luma.dashboard.workspace_hint: Lumi tracks this world automatically. Open the workspace, name a branch, and build.
luma.dashboard.workspace_help: Open the active workspace for this dimension to save versions, inspect history, or recover a draft.
luma.dashboard.workspace_recovery: %s tracked block changes are waiting in the recovery draft.
luma.dashboard.other_workspaces_help: These workspaces belong to the same world but a different dimension.
luma.dashboard.workspace_empty_versions: Nothing is saved yet. Build first, then save when you want a checkpoint.
luma.dashboard.workspace_pending: %s unsaved block changes are ready to save.
luma.dashboard.workspace_ready: Everything saved. Keep building or open a branch.
luma.project.workspace_hint: This workspace quietly tracks what you changed in the current dimension.
luma.project.pending_changes_hint: %s unsaved changes are waiting in branch %s.
luma.project.no_versions_hint: No versions yet. Build freely, then save when you want a rollback point.
luma.project.selected_branch_inactive: This is not the active branch. Switch to it if you want new commits or restores here.
luma.project.pending_help: New world edits are recorded on the active branch: %s.
luma.project.branches_help: Variants let you try another idea without touching your current line of work.
luma.project.branch_create_from_selected: The new variant will start from this save: %s.
luma.project.history_story_help: Big cards are the easiest way to browse versions. Open details only when you need to inspect one closely.
luma.project.graph_help: Use this only when you need the full ancestry view.
luma.project.history_search_help: Search by message, author, or version id.
luma.project.diagnostics_help: Rare checks and technical details stay here until you need them.
luma.project.integrity_clean: No integrity warnings or errors were found.
luma.project.integrations_help: Availability and capability summary for supported external tools.
luma.project.log_help: Recent recovery and restore events for this project.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_help: This moves the active branch head to the initial version and starts the rollback.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_warning: Warning: this may remove tracked changes in affected chunks. If fast regeneration is enabled later, it may also replace chunk contents from the world generator.
luma.restore.plan_mode.blocked_fingerpri: generator regen blocked by fingerprint change
luma.history.empty: No versions have been saved yet.
luma.history.quick_save_hint: Write a short note so you can recognize this save later.
luma.history.card_current_summary: This is the latest save on branch %s.
luma.history.card_start_summary: This is the starting point for this branch.
luma.history.card_manual_summary: Saved by hand as a checkpoint you can return to.
luma.history.card_recovery_summary: Recovered from interrupted play so work would not be lost.
luma.history.card_restore_summary: Created around a restore so you can safely move backward.
luma.history.card_legacy_summary: Imported from an older Lumi history format.
luma.history.empty_branch: This branch does not have versions matching the current filter.
luma.variant.creation_hint: Name a variant. Leave the base blank to start from the current latest save%s
luma.log.legacy_notice: This project was loaded from the legacy snapshot-only format.
luma.log.empty: No recovery or restore events recorded yet.
luma.recovery.draft_present: Recovered work: %s tracked changes on variant %s
luma.recovery.summary_help: Lumi found work that was not saved before the game closed.
luma.recovery.summary_behavior: You can put it back into the world, turn it into a normal save, or delete it.
luma.recovery.actions_help: Pick the safe next step for this recovered work.
luma.recovery.save_help: Save it as a normal save on the current variant.
luma.recovery.restore_help: Restore it back into the world without creating a save first.
luma.recovery.discard_help: Remove the recovered work without applying it back into the world.
luma.recovery.discard_extra_help: Discard draft: forget the stored unsaved changes completely.
luma.changes.no_version: Select a version to inspect changes.
luma.changes.no_parent: This version has no parent diff to inspect.
luma.changes.empty: No changed blocks were recorded for this diff.
luma.changes.more: %s more changed blocks are not shown.
luma.preview.no_version: Select a version to inspect its preview.
luma.preview.help: Isometric snapshot for the selected save. Lumi auto-frames the touched area so you can recognize the build before compare or restore.
luma.preview.unavailable: This version does not have a generated preview yet.
luma.preview.missing_file: The preview metadata exists, but the preview file is missing.
luma.preview.load_failed: The preview file could not be loaded on the client.
luma.preview.refresh_help: Refresh preview queues a new textured isometric capture for this save area.
luma.materials.no_version: Select a version to inspect the material delta.
luma.materials.empty: No material delta is available for the selected version.
luma.materials.more: %s more material entries are not shown.
luma.integrations.empty: No integration status entries are available.
luma.compare.left_help: Enter a save id, variant id, or `current` for the current build.
luma.compare.right_help: Enter a save id, variant id, or `current` for the current build.
luma.compare.preset_help: Use presets to avoid typing ids manually.
luma.compare.setup_help: Pick two saves, variants, or the current build.
luma.compare.blocks_help: Showing up to %s changed block entries.
luma.compare.variants_hint: You can also enter branch ids: %s
luma.compare.empty: Choose two references or use the presets above to start comparing.
luma.create_project.name: Project name
luma.settings.autoversions_help: Save versions automatically after a quiet period.
luma.settings.safety_snapshot_help: Store the current draft as a checkpoint before restoring an older version.
luma.settings.preview_generation_help: Create isometric preview images when saves are made.
luma.settings.auto_minutes_help: How often Lumi may create an automatic version.
luma.settings.idle_seconds_help: How long tracked edits may stay idle before Lumi closes the current change session.
luma.settings.snapshot_every_help: Create a full checkpoint snapshot after this many saved versions.
luma.settings.snapshot_volume_help: Create a checkpoint snapshot when the changed volume becomes large enough.
luma.settings.snapshot_mode_hint: Snapshots are automatic now: Lumi stores full sparse snapshots for touched chunks.
luma.settings.automation_help: Tune how Lumi creates versions in the background.
luma.settings.preview_help: Preview generation is optional and does not block version saving.
luma.settings.debug_help: Verbose tracing for capture, save, restore, compare, HUD, and background operations.
luma.settings.debug_logging_help: Write detailed runtime logs for this workspace. You can also force it globally with `-Dlumi.debug=true`.
luma.settings.project_state_help: These flags only change how the project appears in menus.
luma.settings.favorite_help: Show this workspace as a favorite where favorites are supported.
luma.settings.archive_help: Hide this workspace from the main dashboard list.
luma.settings.diagnostics_help: Read-only checks for project integrity live here.
luma.settings.save_help: All settings and project flags are saved together.
luma.settings.error_positive_int: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
luma.settings.error_positive_decimal: Enter a number greater than zero.
luma.status.singleplayer_only: This workflow is currently supported in local singleplayer only.
luma.status.admin_required: Lumi requires operator rights or cheats enabled in this world.
luma.status.project_failed: Workspace data could not be loaded.
luma.status.restore_started: Restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.partial_restore_started: Partial restore started. Lumi is applying the selected region.
luma.status.partial_restore_invalid_boun: Partial restore bounds must be valid numbers.
luma.status.undo_started: Undo started. Lumi is rolling back the latest tracked action.
luma.status.redo_started: Redo started. Lumi is replaying the latest tracked action.
luma.status.undo_unavailable: There is no tracked Lumi action to undo here.
luma.status.redo_unavailable: There is no tracked Lumi action to redo here.
luma.status.initial_restore_confirmation: Confirm restore to Initial before Lumi changes the world.
luma.status.draft_restore_started: Recovery draft restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.recovery_version_saved: Recovery draft saved as a version.
luma.status.world_operation_busy: Another world operation is already running.
luma.status.settings_invalid: Fix the invalid fields before saving.
luma.status.create_ready: Create a project by entering bounds and a name.
luma.status.history_imported: History package imported as a review project.
luma.status.merge_preview_loading: Building merge review in the background.
luma.status.merge_conflicts_found: Merge conflicts were found. Review the overlap before applying anything.
luma.status.merge_no_changes: There is nothing new to merge from this imported variant.
luma.status.merge_started: Merge started. Lumi is writing the merged version in the background.
luma.status.save_started: Save started. Lumi is writing version data in the background.
luma.status.amend_started: Amend started. Lumi is rewriting the branch head in the background.
luma.status.recovery_save_started: Recovery save started. Lumi is writing version data in the background.
luma.screen.save.title: Save: %s
luma.screen.save_details.title: Save details: %s
luma.screen.variants.title: Variants: %s
luma.screen.share.title: Share: %s
luma.project.build_clean_help: Everything from this build is already saved.
luma.project.build_dirty_help: These changes are ready to save or compare.
luma.project.recovery_hint: Unsaved work is already protected if the game closes now.
luma.project.more_help: Rare tools stay here until you need them.
luma.save.empty_help: Build a bit more, then come back when you want a restore point.
luma.save.summary_help: Lumi saves the current build state in this dimension.
luma.save.name_help: Describe what you are about to keep.
luma.save.suggestions_help: Use one if it fits, or write your own.
luma.save.more_help: Less common save tools stay here.
luma.save.replace_help: Replace the latest save on this variant: %s
luma.save.replace_unavailable: Replace latest save becomes available when this variant already has a latest save.
luma.save_details.changes_help: Use this to understand what this save would bring back.
luma.save_details.more_help: Advanced actions and raw info stay here.
luma.save_details.create_variant: Create new variant from this save
luma.partial_restore.title: Partial restore
luma.partial_restore.help: Restore only the selected bounds and save the result as a new version.
luma.variants.overview_help: Use variants when you want to try another idea without risking the current one.
luma.variants.create_help: The new variant will start from %s.
luma.variants.name_help: Name the idea you want to try.
luma.variants.list_help: Switch when you want to continue another direction.
luma.variants.no_head: No saves yet on this variant.
luma.share.title: Share & Merge
luma.share.help: Export one variant as a portable history package, import a shared package for review, then merge it into a local variant when the overlap is safe.
luma.share.export_help: Create a package for the selected variant. You can upload or send that zip outside Lumi.
luma.share.import_help: Import a shared package from the exports folder or an absolute path. Lumi brings it in as a review project first.
luma.share.packages_help: Review imported history packages here, then merge them into a local variant when the overlap is understood.
luma.share.merge_help: Choose the local target variant, review overlap, and merge only when the package does not conflict.
luma.share.imported_empty: No imported history packages are available for this project yet.
luma.share.merge_preview_loading: Lumi is comparing the imported lineage with the selected local variant.
luma.share.merge_conflicts: Same area changed in both variants: %s blocks across %s chunks.
luma.share.merge_no_changes: The imported variant does not add any new changes on top of this target.
luma.share.merge_unresolved_help: Pick a choice for every conflict zone before applying the merge.
luma.share.merge_ready: Ready to merge %s imported block changes.
luma.compare.more_help: Raw references and chunk counts stay here.
luma.recovery.message_help: Optional note for the new save.
